configurations.name: static-site
runtimeArgs: import sys; sys.path = [p for p in sys.path if p]; import http.server, functools, os; port = int(os.environ.get('PORT', 8743)); h = functools.partial(http.server.SimpleHTTPRequestHandler, directory='/Users/mohammadmaher/Documents/Appoint/Landing/Claude code'); http.server.ThreadingHTTPServer(('127.0.0.1', port), h).serve_forever()
